title: My Sister Forged A Will, Stole Mom's House, And Left Me Nothing. So I Named A Wing After Her.
description: After my sister forged a will to steal Mom’s house, I found a hidden video diary proving elder coercion. I sued, bought the house back at auction, then turned it into a home for abandoned seniors with a wing named after her. She never saw it coming. #RevengeStory #FamilyBetrayal #Karma
thumb_text: I NAMED A WING AFTER HER

thumb_lines.text: DISCOVERED A HIDDEN VIDEO DIARY BEGGING FOR HELP
